title: Property Management Users
excerpt: I would like to connect with other businesses similar to ours to brainstorm and share ideas about how we can get more use out of Monday.  We are a team of property managers and currently use Monday as a CRM and vendor da…

posts.author: melanieclubone (Melanie Hellmann)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to connect with other businesses similar to ours to brainstorm and share ideas about how we can get more use out of Monday. We are a team of property managers and currently use Monday as a CRM and vendor database. Here is a link to our website. https://www.club1co.com/

Are there any other property management, real estate or house managers who would be willing to connect? Thank you! Melanie
